## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link related issues (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## How to test

<!-- Steps for a reviewer to verify the change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changes to `src/lib` logic
- [ ] Ran `npm run generate:types` if a PayloadCMS collection changed
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, tokens, anything under `data/`)
- [ ] Screenshots included for UI changes
- [ ] Noted any user-facing or configuration changes (new env vars, migrations)
